tasks.prompt: Write 5 original English sentences using Reported Speech Part 2 — Questions & Commands.
tasks.hindiPrompt: Reported Speech Part 2 — Questions & Commands का उपयोग करते हुए 5 नए वाक्य लिखिए।
tasks.sampleAnswer: He asked, "Are you coming?" He asked if I was coming. She asked, "Where do you live?" She asked where I lived. He said, "Do this work."

tasks.prompt: Write a short paragraph (5-6 lines) using Reported Speech Part 2 — Questions & Commands.
tasks.hindiPrompt: Reported Speech Part 2 — Questions & Commands का उपयोग करते हुए एक छोटा पैराग्राफ लिखिए।
tasks.sampleAnswer: He told me to do this work. She said, "Do not come here." She told me not to come here. They asked, "Are you ready?" They asked if I was ready.

tasks.prompt: Translate into English: "उसने पूछा, "तुम क्या कर रहे हो?""
tasks.hindiPrompt: नीचे दिए गए वाक्य का अंग्रेज़ी अनुवाद करें।

tasks.prompt: Correct this sentence: "She asked where I lived yesterday."
tasks.hindiPrompt: इस वाक्य में गलती ठीक कीजिए।

tasks.prompt: Write a short 4-line dialogue using Reported Speech Part 2 — Questions & Commands.
tasks.hindiPrompt: Reported Speech Part 2 — Questions & Commands का उपयोग करते हुए एक संवाद लिखिए।
tasks.sampleAnswer: The teacher said, "Be quiet." The teacher told us to be quiet. She asked, "When will you come?" She asked when I would come.
